name: Polymarket CLOB (Trading)
description: Polymarket Central Limit Order Book — authenticated trading surface for placing, cancelling, and tracking orders on prediction markets. Pair with the public `polymarket` integration (gamma-api) for market data and slug→tokenId lookups; this entry handles the signed (HMAC + EIP-712) write path. Requires both an L2 API credential triplet (api_key/secret/passphrase, obtainable from the Polymarket UI) AND a Polygon wallet private key (used to EIP-712-sign each order). Settles in USDC on Polygon mainnet (chain 137).

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: L2 API Key
credential_fields.description: Polymarket CLOB L2 API Key (generate via Polymarket UI → Settings → API Keys, or via the SDK derive_api_key flow).

credential_fields.name: secret
credential_fields.label: L2 API Secret
credential_fields.description: Base64-encoded L2 secret returned alongside the api_key.

credential_fields.name: passphrase
credential_fields.label: L2 API Passphrase
credential_fields.description: L2 passphrase returned alongside the api_key.

credential_fields.name: private_key
credential_fields.label: Polygon wallet private key
credential_fields.description: 32-byte hex (with or without 0x prefix) of the wallet that holds your USDC + funded the proxy/Safe. Used for EIP-712 order signing only. Never leaves this server.

credential_fields.name: address
credential_fields.label: Wallet address
credential_fields.description: 0x-prefixed Polygon address corresponding to the private key. Sent as POLY_ADDRESS header on every authenticated request.

credential_fields.name: funder_address
credential_fields.label: Funder address (optional)
credential_fields.description: Address that actually holds USDC. Equals address for EOAs; differs for Safe / Polymarket-proxy wallets. Defaults to address when empty.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: USDC (or per-token conditional) balance and trading allowances.

tools.name: get_open_orders
tools.description: Every currently-live order. Optional filter by condition_id (market) or token_id (asset_id).

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: One order by id. Returns status (LIVE / FILLED / CANCELED) + fill detail.

tools.name: get_trades
tools.description: Fill history. Optional filter by condition_id or token_id.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel one open order by id. Idempotent: returns ok even if the order was already filled / cancelled.

tools.name: cancel_all_orders
tools.description: Cancel every open order on the account.

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Place a limit order on the CLOB. The order body is EIP-712 typed-data-signed with your Polygon wallet key BEFORE the request envelope is HMAC-signed for L2 auth. Price is between 0 and 1 (probability). Use the gamma-api `get_clob_market` tool first to resolve a market slug to its token IDs (one for YES, one for NO).

order.description: The Polymarket Order struct — fields match the on-chain EIP-712 schema. Required fields: salt, maker, signer, taker, tokenId, makerAmount, takerAmount, expiration, nonce, feeRateBps, side, signatureType.

taker.description: Counterparty restriction; 0x000...0 for an open order.

tokenId.description: Conditional token id (one of YES/NO from get_clob_market).

makerAmount.description: Amount maker is offering, in atomic units (6-decimal USDC for collateral, 6-decimal token for sells).

nonce.description: Operator-tracked nonce (we use 0 unless replay-protecting across L2 keys).

feeRateBps.description: Fee rate basis points; 0 for standard accounts.
